docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE SERVED SEP-07-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOCA, FRANSICO (OWNER, TOPA PARK)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORT, RADIAH SIMONE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOCA, FRANSICO (OWNER, TOPA PARK) THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOCA, FRANSICO (OWNER, TOPA PARK)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY FORT, RADIAH SIMONE AS TO DEFENDANT TOCA, FRANSICO (OWNER, TOPA PARK) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORT, RADIAH SIMONE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.
